About Emancee

The Artist Behind the Claws

✦ Appointment Only ✦ Private Studio ✦ Beginner Nail Artist

Welcome to Claws by Emancee — a home-based luxury nail studio in Fourways, Johannesburg. Every set is handcrafted with artistry, precision, and a whole lot of passion. Emancee doesn't just do nails — she creates wearable art.

From soft, delicate French tips to bold sculpted extensions, from intricate hand-painted designs to stunning 3D nail art — no two sets are ever the same. Every client leaves feeling like royalty.

Whether you're after something minimal and elegant or something dramatic and show-stopping, Emancee's got you. She works with all nail types and lengths, and her artistry speaks for itself.

"

Your nails are the accessory you never take off — make them unforgettable.

— Emancee
✦ Extensions ✦ Nail Art ✦ 3D Sculpting ✦ Pedicures ✦ Acrylics ✦ Polygel ✦ Gel-X ✦ Chrome

How to Book

by Emancee

01

WhatsApp Emancee

Send a WhatsApp to 077 426 3191. You'll receive an automated greeting — follow all instructions carefully.

Message Now →
02

Read the Policies

Make sure you've read and understood all nail policies before booking. Booking = you agree to all policies.

03

Pay Your Deposit

Once your time slot is confirmed, a deposit must be paid within 1 hour to secure your appointment. Unpaid = booking released.

04

Book 24 Hours in Advance

All appointments must be booked at least 24 hours before your desired date. No exceptions.

Banking Details

BankCapitec Bank
Account No.2238146756
Account NameClawsByEmancee

⚠️ Deposits must be an immediate payment. Use your full name as reference and send proof of payment once done.

Policies

Please read carefully before booking

📅 Booking Policy

Appointments

  • No extra guests or children — space is limited.
  • Book at least 24 hours in advance.
  • Arrive with bare nails unless you've booked a soak-off.

Payment

  • A 50% non-refundable deposit is required to secure your slot.
  • Remaining balance is due on the day.
  • Cash or instant EFT accepted.

Cancellation & Reschedule

  • Give 24+ hours notice to reschedule or cancel.
  • Deposit can transfer to a new date with 24+ hours notice.
  • Same-day cancellations or no-shows forfeit the deposit completely.

Late Policy

  • 15-minute grace period allowed.
  • After 15 minutes: R50 late fee added.
  • After 20 minutes: appointment cancelled.

🔧 Refund & Repair Policy

All services are non-refundable once completed. Inspect your nails before leaving — concerns must be raised immediately.

Repairs

  • Free repairs within 48 hours for lifting or breakage from application issues.
  • In-studio repairs only — no house calls.
  • Send a clear photo within 48 hours to qualify.
  • Repairs after 48 hours are charged.
  • Subject to availability — not guaranteed same-day.

No Refunds or Repairs If:

  • Nails are bitten, picked, ripped, pulled or soaked off.
  • Damage caused by aftercare, lifestyle, or accidents.
  • Client cannot return in-studio for repairs.
  • Another nail tech has worked on the set.
  • Aftercare instructions were not followed.

💅 Retention Disclaimer

  • Retention varies per client — nail chemistry, lifestyle, length, and shape all matter.
  • Long shapes (stiletto/coffin) require extra care.
🐱 Home-based studio with two cats on the premises. Please let us know if you have allergies or prefer a pet-free environment!
